IMPORTS & MAPPING

Bring appointments and clients into REVORY without sending your team back to spreadsheet cleanup.

REVORY should make imports feel effortless. Upload the file you already have, let the product read the headers, confirm the mapping inside the app, and keep the correction path visible when something still needs review.

Guided import

RECOMMENDED PATH

Official template first

The official REVORY template is still the fastest path when you want a predictable first import.

ASSISTED IMPORT

Header detection inside the app

When your export uses different header names, REVORY now reads the columns, suggests matches, and lets you confirm the mapping before upload.

CUSTOMER TRUST

Clear outcome after every import

Validation, persistence, warnings, and rejected rows remain explicit so the customer always understands what landed and what still needs attention.

REVORY APPOINTMENTS TEMPLATE

Upload with guided mapping inside REVORY.

Use the appointments lane for schedule-level exports. The best experience is the REVORY template, but the guided mapper now helps when your source file uses different column names.

Download template

STEP 1

Bring the file you have

Choose the official template or start from the CSV export you already have.

STEP 2

REVORY reads the headers, suggests matches, and lets you confirm the mapping inside the app.

STEP 3

Once the mapping is clear, REVORY prepares the import structure and runs the upload.
